2021November 8, 2021

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, November 8, 2021 -- November 12, 2021

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2021-11-virtual

19 Resolutions

1088Plenary
Retire CVS and migrate repositories to Bitbucket GIT
SC 4 approves the retirement of CVS and migrate content to ISO Bitbucket per the schedule below: |=== |Action |Date |Stop using CVS on |December 15, 2021 |Archive CVS STEPMod to ISO WG12 Member Are...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1087Plenary
Retire Bugzilla and migrate to JIRA for issue management
SC 4 supports the recommendation of WG 12 and agrees to retire Bugzilla as the system of record for CR management and authorizes WG12 to start working in JIRA per the following schedule: |=== |Acti...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1086Plenary
Launch ISO 23301 ed2 and nominate project leader
SC 4 requests is Committee Manager coordinate with ISO CS and launch ISO 23301 ed2 at Stage 20 with SDT 18 and the following schedule dates: * Circulation of 1st Working Draft to experts: 2022-04-1...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1085Plenary
Reallocate SMRL projects from WG 21 to WG 12
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO CS and reallocate the following projects from ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 21 to ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 12: * ISO/CD TS 10303-4443 * ISO/AWI TS 10303-1847 ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1084Plenary
Modify DIS target date for ISO 10303-239 ed3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager modify the target date for Stage 40.00 (DIS Registered) to 2022-04-15.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1083Plenary
Request duration change to SDT 36 for ISO 10303-2
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS to move ISO 10303-2 (project id = 81196) from SDT 24 to SDT 36 with the following dates: * Stage 30 -- Committee Draft Registered: 2021-12...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1082Plenary
Recommend Committee Specific Procedure for JWG 24 database standards
SC 4 thanks the experts from both ISO and IEC in developing a CSP that meets the needs of both organizations toward the management of standards in database format.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1081Plenary
Request one-year extension for ISO 15926-4 ed3 project
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO CS and move ISO/TS 15926-4 ed3 from SDT 24 to SDT 36 allowing the project team additional time to complete the project by 05 Jun 2023.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1080Plenary
Extend the term of Ad Hoc Group 2 on Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification
SC 4 extends the term of Ad Hoc Group 2 on Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification to the 83rd SC 4 Plenary.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1079Plenary
Appoint and recognize liaison representatives for 2022-2024 term

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1078Plenary
Appoint Convenors and Deputy Convenors for 2022-2024 term
SC 4 appoints the following Convenors and Deputy Convenors for a three-year term [2022-2024], with appreciation to serve in this capacity. Note the Convenor for the PPC is appointed to a two-year t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1077Plenary

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
